description_long: This is a rectangular woven picnic basket with a natural, light brown coloration and a sturdy, boxy structure. The basket features two thick, rounded handles made of the same woven material, attached to the longer sides and able to pivot upright for carrying. The weave is tight and uniform, giving the basket a robust and traditional appearance, with subtle variations in the coloration of the fibers. The rim of the basket is reinforced with a thicker band of weaving, providing additional strength and a finished look. The interior is spacious and open, with no visible lining or compartments, making it suitable for carrying food, utensils, or other picnic essentials. There are no visible decorative elements or closure mechanisms, and the basket does not have a lid.
description: A rectangular, tightly woven picnic basket with two pivoting handles and a reinforced rim, finished in natural light brown tones. The basket is open-topped and lacks decorative elements or a lid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular shape, woven texture, and both handles upright.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the handles aligned along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the basket's symmetry and woven details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and upright handles.
attribute_handle_type: Two thick, rounded, folding handles made of woven wicker, attached to the long sides and able to pivot upright.
attribute_weave_pattern: Plain, tight, and uniform weave with subtle color variation and reinforced rim.
